H6900.derivation: or קְבֻרָה; feminine passive participle of H6912 (קָבַר);

H6901.strongs_def: to admit, i.e. take (literally or figuratively)

H6903.strongs_def: (adverbially) in front of; usually (with other particles) on account of, so as, since, hence
H6903.kjv_def: [phrase] according to, [phrase] as, [phrase] because, before, [phrase] for this cause, [phrase] forasmuch as, [phrase] by this means, over against, by reason of, [phrase] that, [phrase] therefore, [phrase] though, [phrase] wherefore.

H6904.derivation: from H6901 (קָבַל) in the sense of confronting (as standing opposite in order to receive);

H6905.derivation: from H6901 (קָבַל) in the sense of opposite (see H6904 (קֹבֶל));
H6905.strongs_def: the presence, i.e. (adverbially) in front of

H6907.strongs_def: a goblet (as deep like a cover)

H6908.kjv_def: assemble (selves), gather (bring) (together, selves together, up), heap, resort, [idiom] surely, take up.

H6909.derivation: from H6908 (קָבַץ) and H410 (אֵל); God has gathered;

H6911.derivation: dual from H6908 (קָבַץ); a double heap;

H6914.derivation: from the feminine plural of H6913 (קֶבֶר) and H8378 (תַּאֲוָה) with the article interposed; graves of the longing;
H6914.strongs_def: Kibroth-hat-Taavh, a place in the Desert

H6915.strongs_def: to shrivel up, i.e. contract or bend the body (or neck) in deference

H6918.strongs_def: sacred (ceremonially or morally); (as noun) God (by eminence), an angel, a saint, a sanctuary

H6921.strongs_def: the fore or front part; hence (by orientation) the East (often adverbially, eastward, for brevity the east wind)

H6922.strongs_def: {sacred (ceremonially or morally); (as noun) God (by eminence), an angel, a saint, a sanctuary}

H6923.strongs_def: to project (one self), i.e. precede; hence, to anticipate, hasten, meet (usually for help)
H6923.usage: prevent(15x), before(6x), met(2x), come(1x), disappoint(1x), go(1x)

H6924.strongs_def: the front, of place (absolutely, the fore part, relatively the East) or time (antiquity); often used adverbially (before, anciently, eastward)
H6924.kjv_def: aforetime, ancient (time), before, east (end, part, side, -ward), eternal, [idiom] ever(-lasting), forward, old, past. Compare H6926 (קִדְמָה).
H6924.usage: east(32x), old(17x), eastward(11x), ancient(6x), before(3x), aforetime(1x), eternal(1x)

H6925.kjv_def: before, [idiom] from, [idiom] I (thought), [idiom] me, [phrase] of, [idiom] it pleased, presence.

H6926.strongs_def: the forward part (or relatively) East (often adverbially, on the east or in front)

H6931.kjv_def: ancient, they that went before, east, (thing of) old.

H6932.strongs_def: Kedemoth, a place in eastern Palestine

H6933.derivation: (Aramaic) from a root corresponding to H6923 (קָדַם);

H6934.derivation: from H6924 (קֶדֶם) and H410 (אֵל); presence of God;
H6934.strongs_def: Kadmiel, the name of three Israelites

H6935.derivation: the same as H6931 (קַדְמוֹנִי); ancient, i.e. aboriginal;
H6935.strongs_def: Kadmonite (collectively), the name of a tribe in Palestine

H6936.strongs_def: the crown of the head (as the part most bowed)
H6936.kjv_def: crown (of the head), pate, scalp, top of the head.

H6937.strongs_def: to be ashy, i.e. darkcolored; by implication, to mourn (in sackcloth or sordid garments)
H6937.kjv_def: be black(-ish), be (make) dark(-en), [idiom] heavily, (cause to) mourn.
H6937.usage: mourn(6x), black(4x), dark(4x), blackish(1x), darkened(1x), heavily(1x)

H6938.derivation: from H6937 (קָדַר); dusky (of the skin or the tent);
H6938.strongs_def: Kedar, a son of Ishmael; also (collectively) Bedouin (as his descendants or representatives)
H6938.pos: proper masculine noun, proper noun with reference to people

H6939.pos: proper noun with reference to a stream

H6941.strongs_def: blackish ones (i.e. in sackcloth); used adverbially, in mourning weeds

H6942.strongs_def: to be (causatively, make, pronounce or observe as) clean (ceremonially or morally)
H6942.kjv_def: appoint, bid, consecrate, dedicate, defile, hallow, (be, keep) holy(-er, place), keep, prepare, proclaim, purify, sanctify(-ied one, self), [idiom] wholly.
H6942.usage: sanctify(108x), hallow(25x), dedicate(10x), holy(7x), prepare(7x), consecrate(5x), appointed(1x), bid(1x), purified(1x)

H6943.strongs_def: Kedesh, the name of four places in Palestine

H6944.strongs_def: a sacred place or thing; rarely abstract, sanctity
H6944.kjv_def: consecrated (thing), dedicated (thing), hallowed (thing), holiness, ([idiom] most) holy ([idiom] day, portion, thing), saint, sanctuary.
H6944.usage: holy(262x), sanctuary(68x), most(44x), holiness(30x), dedicated(5x), hallowed(3x), consecrated(1x)

H6945.strongs_def: a (quasi) sacred person, i.e. (technically) a (male) devotee (by prostitution) to licentious idolatry

H6946.strongs_def: Kadesh, a place in the Desert

H6947.derivation: from the same as H6946 (קָדֵשׁ) and an otherwise unused word (apparently compounded of a correspondent to H1251 (בַּר) and a derivative of H5128 (נוּעַ)) meaning desert of a fugitive; Kadesh of (the) Wilderness of Wandering;
H6947.strongs_def: Kadesh-Barnea, a place in the Desert

H6949.kjv_def: be set on edge, be blunt.

H6953.derivation: feminine of active participle from H6950 (קָהַל);
H6953.strongs_def: a (female) assembler (i.e. lecturer); abstractly, preaching (used as a 'nom de plume', Koheleth)

H6954.strongs_def: Kehelathah, a place in the Desert

H6955.derivation: from an unused root meaning to ally oneself; allied;

H6956.strongs_def: a Kohathite (collectively) or descendants of Kehath

H6957.strongs_def: a cord (as connecting), especially formeasuring; figuratively, a rule; also a rim, a musical string or accord
H6957.kjv_def: line. Compare H6978 (קַו־קַו)lemma קַו־קַי yod, corrected to קַו־קַו.

H6960.strongs_def: to bind together (perhaps by twisting), i.e. collect; (figuratively) to expect
H6960.kjv_def: gather (together), look, patiently, tarry, wait (for, on, upon).

H6962.strongs_def: properly, to cut off, i.e. (figuratively) detest

H6963.derivation: or קֹל; from an unused root meaning to call aloud;
H6963.kjv_def: [phrase] aloud, bleating, crackling, cry ([phrase] out), fame, lightness, lowing, noise, [phrase] hold peace, (pro-) claim, proclamation, [phrase] sing, sound, [phrase] spark, thunder(-ing), voice, [phrase] yell.
H6963.usage: voice(383x), noise(49x), sound(39x), thunder(10x), thunderings(2x), fame(1x)

H6964.derivation: from H6963 (קוֹל) and H3050 (יָהּ); voice of Jah;
H6964.strongs_def: Kolajah, the name of two Israelites

H6965.strongs_def: to rise (in various applications, literal, figurative, intensive and causative)
H6965.kjv_def: abide, accomplish, [idiom] be clearer, confirm, continue, decree, [idiom] be dim, endure, [idiom] enemy, enjoin, get up, make good, help, hold, (help to) lift up (again), make, [idiom] but newly, ordain, perform, pitch, raise (up), rear (up), remain, (a-) rise (up) (again, against), rouse up, set (up), (e-) stablish, (make to) stand (up), stir up, strengthen, succeed, (as-, make) sure(-ly), (be) up(-hold, -rising).
H6965.usage: arise(211x), raise(47x), establish(27x), stand(27x), perform(25x), confirm(9x), again(5x), set(5x), stablish(3x), surely(3x), continue(3x), sure(2x), abide(1x), accomplish(1x)

H6966.strongs_def: {to rise (in various applications, literal, figurative, intensive and causative)}
H6966.kjv_def: appoint, establish, make, raise up self, (a-) rise (up), (make to) stand, set (up).
H6966.usage: arise(5x), stand(5x), set(4x), establish(3x), appointeth(1x), made(1x), rise(1x)

H6969.strongs_def: to strike a musical note, i.e. chant or wail (at a funeral)

H6970.derivation: probably from H6972 (קוּץ) in the original sense of cutting off; curtailment;

H6972.derivation: a primitive root; to clip off; used only as denominative from H7019 (קַיִץ);

H6973.derivation: a primitive root (identical with through the idea of severing oneself from (compare H6962 (קוּט)));
H6973.strongs_def: to be (causatively, make) disgusted or anxious
H6973.kjv_def: abhor, be distressed, be grieved, loathe, vex, be weary.
H6973.usage: abhor(3x), weary(2x), loath(1x), distressed(1x), vex(1x), grieved(1x)

H6974.derivation: a primitive root (identical with through the idea of abruptness in starting up from sleep (compare H3364 (יָקַץ)));

H6975.derivation: or קֹץ; from H6972 (קוּץ) (in the sense of pricking);

H6976.strongs_def: Kots, the name of two Israelites

H6977.derivation: feminine passive participle of H6972 (קוּץ) in its original sense;

H6978.derivation: from H6957 (קַו) (in the sense of a fastening);

H6979.derivation: a primitive root; also denominative from H7023 (קִיר)
H6979.strongs_def: to trench; by implication, to throw forth;  to wall up, whether literal (to build a wall) or figurative (to estop)
H6979.kjv_def: break down, cast out, destroy, dig.

H6980.strongs_def: (only plural) trenches, i.e. a web (as if so formed)

H6981.derivation: or קֹרֵא; (1 Chronicles 26:1), active participle of H7121 (קָרָא); crier;
H6981.strongs_def: Kore, the name of two Israelites

H6982.strongs_def: a rafter (forming trenches as it were); by implication, a roof

H6983.derivation: a primitive root; to bend; used only as denominative for H3369 (יָקֹשׁ),

H6984.derivation: from the passive participle of H6983 (קוֹשׁ) and H3050 (יָהּ); entrapped of Jah;

H6985.derivation: from H6990 (קָטַט) in the sense of abbreviation;

H6986.derivation: from an unused root meaning to cut off;

H6989.derivation: feminine passive participle of H6999 (קָטַר); perfumed;

H6991.strongs_def: properly, to cut off, i.e. (figuratively) put to death

H6994.derivation: a primitive root (rather denominative from H6996 (קָטָן));
H6994.strongs_def: to diminish, i.e. be (causatively, make) diminutive or (figuratively) of no account
H6994.kjv_def: be a (make) small (thing), be not worthy.

H6995.strongs_def: a pettiness, i.e. the little finger

H6996.strongs_def: abbreviated, i.e. diminutive, literally (in quantity, size or number) or figuratively (in age or importance)
H6996.kjv_def: least, less(-er), little (one), small(-est, one, quantity, thing), young(-er, -est).
H6996.usage: small(33x), little(19x), youngest(15x), younger(14x), least(10x), less(3x), lesser(2x), smallest(1x), young(1x)

H6999.derivation: a primitive root (identical with through the idea of fumigation in a close place and perhaps thus driving out the occupants);
H6999.strongs_def: to smoke, i.e. turn into fragrance by fire (especially as an act of worship)
H6999.kjv_def: burn (incense, sacrifice) (upon), (altar for) incense, kindle, offer (incense, a sacrifice).
